easy.description: During a college fest, the canteen cashbox goes missing after closing time.
easy.initial_clue: Guard Nisha saw someone in a red hoodie running toward Parking B around 20:15.

responses.[\"Nisha\"]: Red-hoodie sprinted to Parking B at 20:15 and left on a bike.

responses.[\"Parking B\",\"20:10-20:20\"]: Bike GJ05 XY 7788 exited carrying a small lockbox at 20:16.

responses.[\"Imran the Vendor\"]: Says Neeraj borrowed his bike to 'drop props' at 20:05.
responses.[\"Neeraj the Volunteer\"]: Look, I have better things to do. Are we done with this little drama?
After intense questioning and faced with irrefutable evidence, Neeraj the Volunteer finally confesses to the crime.

easy.summary: Witness → CCTV plate → bike owner → link to Neeraj → confession.

easy.description: A high-end microscope disappears from Lab 203 after hours.
easy.initial_clue: Security email shows an after-hours door swipe at 22:12.

responses.[\"Lab 203\",\"22:00-22:30\"]: Swipe: ID#17 (Karthik) at 22:12; no other swipes.

responses.[\"Lab 203 Corridor\",\"22:10-22:20\"]: Karthik leaving with a duffel bag at 22:16.

responses.[\"Karthik the Research Assistant\"]: Admits taking it to pawn after his grant got delayed.

easy.summary: Access logs + corridor CCTV → direct confession.

easy.description: The sacred Ganesh idol is stolen from a Mumbai temple shrine overnight.
easy.initial_clue: Witness Chaiwala Ram saw a white Maruti Swift speeding away at midnight.

responses.[\"Ram\"]: Saw white Maruti Swift speeding near MG Road around midnight.

responses.[\"MG Road\",\"00:00-00:10\"]: Captured Swift MH12 AB 1234 near Vikram’s shop at 00:05.

responses.[\"MH12 AB 1234\"]: Registered to Vikram the Local Shopkeeper.

responses.[\"Vikram the Local Shopkeeper\"]: Says Anil borrowed his car that night.
responses.[\"Anil the Security Guard\"]: Confesses to stealing the idol to sell it secretly.

easy.summary: Witness → CCTV → plate owner → link to Anil → confession.

easy.description: A saree boutique is broken into at night; priceless silk sarees go missing.
easy.initial_clue: Fruit seller Lakshmi heard glass shatter and saw a uniformed figure dash away.

responses.[\"Lakshmi\"]: Saw a delivery-boy uniform running toward Shastri Nagar at 23:20.

responses.[\"Shastri Nagar\",\"23:15-23:30\"]: Karan carrying a large saree bundle at 23:20.

responses.[\"9876543210\"]: Karan’s phone pinged near Shastri Nagar around 23:20.

responses.[\"Karan the Delivery Boy\"]: Look, I have better things to do. Are we done with this little drama?
After intense questioning and faced with irrefutable evidence, Karan the Delivery Boy finally confesses to the crime.

easy.description: A woman's necklace gifted by her mom disappears from her jewelry box.
easy.initial_clue: Housemaid Seema saw footprints in the garden.

responses.[\"Seema\"]: Saw footprints in the garden. Also she hasn't seen Vivek all day. But she saw Ramesh around the back gate.

responses.[\"Garden\",\"footprints\"]: Footprints matched size and pattern of Ramesh's sandals.

responses.[\"Vivek the Gardener\"]: I have not stolen anything I am rich enough to buy something for myself. And do you have proof of this accusation? Before you accuse me, get the proof.
responses.[\"Ramesh the Neighbor\"]: Tells he came to meet Mr Joshi and he hasn't done anything.

responses.[\"Vivek the Gardener\"]: Vivek the Gardener finally confesses to the crime said he left the fingerprints by mistake.

easy.description: A signed cricket bat disappears from the Wankhede locker room after a night match.
easy.initial_clue: Security guard Ajit saw a man in a VIP jersey slip into the locker area.

responses.[\"Ajit\"]: Saw someone carrying a bat case toward Gate 4 at ~01:00.

responses.[\"Gate 4\",\"00:55-01:05\"]: Vijay exits with a bat case at 01:02.

responses.[\"Vijay the Batter\"]: Denies, then admits taking the bat to gift his coach.

easy.description: A rare manuscript is stolen from the Delhi Public Library’s restricted section.
easy.initial_clue: Librarian Meera noticed the manuscript missing during morning inventory.

responses.[\"Meera\"]: Saw someone at the library exit with a large bag around 6 in the evening.

responses.[\"Delhi Public Library Exit\",\"18:00-1: Deepak carrying a sack out at 18:07.

responses.[\"Deepak the Librarian Assistant\"]: Come on, I was just passing by. Maybe check your facts before pointing fingers.
After intense questioning and faced with irrefutable evidence, Deepak the Librarian Assistant finally confesses to the crime.

easy.description: Confidential board exam papers are leaked from the education office.
easy.initial_clue: Clerk Rajesh found torn paper bits near the copier.

responses.[\"Clerk Rajesh\"]: Saw someone near the copy room around 02:00 AM.

responses.[\"Copy Room\",\"02:00-02:15\"]: Anil and Sneha came out of the copy room.
responses.[\"Copy Room\",\"01:40-01:59\"]: Found Rajesh leaving the copy room with papers.

responses.[\"Sneha the Messenger\"]: Admits seeing someone else coming out just before they entered.
responses.[\"Anil the Typist\"]: Admits seeing someone else coming out just before they entered.
responses.[\"Clerk Rajesh\"]: Admits that he did for money as the students were going to pay him.

easy.description: Coins vanish from a locked donation box at a Chennai temple during the festival.
easy.initial_clue: Priest Ranganathan found the box unlocked with mud smudges around.

responses.[\"Priest Ranganathan\"]: Saw Mani loitering near the box after midnight.

responses.[\"Temple Hall\",\"00:00-00:10\"]: Mani with muddy hands near the box.

responses.[\"Mani the Pilgrim\"]: Admits taking coins to help his family.

easy.description: An antique Mughal-era painting is stolen from a special exhibit at the Red Fort.
easy.initial_clue: Security guard Arjun heard a glass case click open at 3 AM.

responses.[\"Arjun\"]: Saw a lady tap the case and walk away from the exhibit wing.

responses.[\"Red Fort Exhibit Wing\",\"03:00-03:10: Rekha leaving with a painting roll.

responses.[\"Rekha the Curator\"]: Confesses to a private sale plan.

easy.description: A delivery person’s signature tiffin is reported missing in a busy neighborhood.
easy.initial_clue: Shopkeeper Mehul saw a stray dog dragging a tiffin outside the shop.

responses.[\"Mehul\"]: Saw a kid walking his dogs near the tiffin stand at noon.

responses.[\"Tiffin Stand\",\"12:00-12:10\"]: Chotu picks up a tiffin and walks away.

responses.[\"Chotu the Dog Walker\"]: Admits feeding the tiffin to his dogs after finding it unattended.

easy.description: Packets of chips vanish from the college canteen counter during the lunch rush.
easy.initial_clue: Cashier Smita notes someone with an oversized backpack loitering by the display.

responses.[\"Canteen Counter\",\"12:30-12:50\"]: Raghu repeatedly opens his backpack near the chips rack.

responses.[\"Cashier Smita\"]: Saw a mid aged guy with a black hoodie around noon near the canteen counter, blocking the view of the rack twice.

responses.[\"Raghu the Fresher\"]: Admits he stuffed packets into his bag 'as a dare'.

easy.description: A wallet is reported missing from a canteen bench.
easy.initial_clue: Friend noticed someone leaving the bench in a hurry after lunch.

responses.[\"Friend\"]: Saw someone quickly grab a cloth from the bench zone just after lunch and leave.

responses.[\"Bench Zone\",\"13:00-13:15\"]: Salim pockets a small item while wiping the table.
responses.[\"Canteen\",\"13:00-13:15\"]: Salim pockets a small item while wiping the table.

responses.[\"Salim the Vendor\"]: Admits he picked up the wallet and intended to keep it.
